title: Rupee volatility: Muzzle price signals if necessary but act to close onshore-vs-offshore market gaps
description: RBI’s response to rupee weakness has been a clampdown on non-deliverable forward (NFD) contracts. This is fine in a crisis, but for gaps between offshore and onshore markets to close, we must deepen the latter—even as we do what it takes for a rupee-supportive economy.
